name: Verify Numerical Reasoning
description: Measures the ability to draw correct conclusions from numerical data presented in statistical tables and charts. Suitable for roles requiring data analysis, financial interpretation, and quantitative reasoning. Used for analysts, finance professionals, engineers, and managers.

name: Verify Verbal Reasoning
description: Assesses the ability to evaluate written information and draw correct conclusions. Suitable for roles requiring strong communication, comprehension of complex written material, report writing, or client-facing communication.

name: Verify Inductive Reasoning
description: Measures abstract and inductive reasoning — identifying patterns and logical relationships in non-verbal data. Essential for software developers, data scientists, engineers, and any role requiring analytical problem-solving.

name: Verify Deductive Reasoning
description: Evaluates the ability to draw logical conclusions from given information. Ideal for roles that require structured thinking, evaluating arguments, and logical analysis.

name: Verify Mechanical Comprehension
description: Measures understanding of mechanical and physical concepts. Suitable for engineering, maintenance, technical, and trades roles.

name: OPQ32r
description: The Occupational Personality Questionnaire (OPQ32r) measures 32 personality characteristics relevant to workplace behavior. Assesses teamwork, leadership potential, communication style, interpersonal skills, and work preferences. Used for selection and development across all levels including sales managers, developers, graduates, and executives.

name: Motivation Questionnaire (MQM5)
description: Measures what motivates and engages individuals at work across 18 dimensions. Predicts job satisfaction, engagement, and retention risk. Useful for all professional roles especially sales, consulting, and management.

name: Java 8 (New)
description: Assesses knowledge of Java 8 programming including streams, lambda expressions, functional interfaces, and OOP concepts. Suitable for Java software developers and engineers at mid and senior levels.

name: Python (New)
description: Tests Python programming including syntax, data structures, pandas, numpy, and common paradigms. Ideal for data scientists, backend developers, ML engineers, and data analysts.

name: SQL (New)
description: Evaluates SQL query writing including joins, aggregations, subqueries, and data manipulation. Core assessment for data analysts, data engineers, backend developers, and BI professionals who work with databases and reporting.

name: JavaScript (New)
description: Tests JavaScript including ES6+, async programming, DOM manipulation. Ideal for frontend and full-stack developers.

name: C++ (New)
description: Assesses C++ programming including OOP, memory management, STL, and performance. For systems programming, embedded, and game development roles.

name: Automata - Fix the Code
description: Simulation-based assessment presenting broken code to debug and fix. Measures real programming ability, debugging skills, and practical problem-solving for software developers.

name: General Ability - Short Form
description: Brief measure of general cognitive ability combining verbal, numerical, and inductive reasoning. Used for high-volume hiring and screening across many role types including graduates, professionals, and operators.

name: Graduate 8.0 (Short)
description: Short-form cognitive battery specifically designed for graduate and entry-level hiring. Covers numerical and verbal reasoning normed against graduate populations. Used extensively in campus recruitment and fresh graduate hiring.

name: Workplace English (WE1)
description: Measures English language proficiency in workplace contexts including reading, grammar, and comprehension. Used for roles where English communication is essential.

name: Numerical Reasoning (MR1)
description: Measures basic numerical reasoning and arithmetic. Used for operational, clerical, and entry-level roles requiring basic data handling and number work.

name: Situational Judgement (CCSJ)
description: Presents realistic workplace scenarios asking candidates to choose the best course of action. Measures judgment, decision-making, and professional behavior. Widely used for graduate hiring, management roles, and stakeholder-facing positions.

name: Dependability & Safety Instrument (DSI)
description: Measures attitudes toward reliability, safety compliance, and workplace integrity. Essential for manufacturing, logistics, warehousing, operations, and safety-critical environments.

name: CustomerFirst (CF3)
description: Situational judgement test for customer service and retail sales roles. Measures service orientation, customer handling, empathy, and problem resolution skills.

name: Sales Solution (SSCE)
description: Role-specific assessment for sales professionals measuring persuasion, resilience, customer focus, and commercial acumen. Validated for B2B, B2C, enterprise sales, account management, and business development roles.

name: Management & Leadership Report (MLR)
description: Based on OPQ personality data, provides insights on management potential, leadership style, and team effectiveness. Used for selecting and developing managers, directors, and senior leaders including sales managers.

name: Universal Competency Report (UCR)
description: Generates a competency report from OPQ data mapped to SHL's Universal Competency Framework. Identifies strengths across 20 competencies. Used for talent development, succession planning, and professional roles.

name: Contact Center Solution
description: Assessment for contact center and BPO roles measuring communication, multi-tasking, customer empathy, and problem-solving under pressure. Specifically designed for inbound/outbound call center agents.

name: Operational Assessment (OP5)
description: Evaluates problem-solving, attention to detail, and ability to follow instructions for operational and blue-collar roles. Used in logistics, warehousing, manufacturing, and supply chain.

name: Technology Professional (TP1)
description: Situational judgement test for technology professionals covering stakeholder management, technical decision-making, and problem-solving in IT contexts. Ideal for developers, tech leads, and engineering managers who interact with business stakeholders.

name: Agency Worker Screener
description: Quick screener for agency and temporary worker hiring measuring work ethic, reliability, and basic workplace behaviors. Designed for high-volume blue-collar screening.

name: Graduate Personality Questionnaire
description: Personality assessment tailored for graduate and entry-level hiring. Measures interpersonal style, openness, and work preferences normed against graduate populations. Used in campus recruitment and early career hiring programs.

name: Verbal Reasoning (MV1)
description: Basic verbal reasoning for operational and entry-level roles. Measures ability to understand written instructions and simple language comprehension.

name: Calculation (MN2)
description: Tests basic calculation and arithmetic. Appropriate for clerical, accounting support, and operational roles that require working with numbers.
